_about: Shape/contract evals for the judgment skills. Zero deps, no network, no LLM. Each case asserts a skill DOCUMENTS its verdict line and that a canonical example parses. See README.md.

cases.situation: A completion claim ('the login fix works') is made before commit.
cases.canonical_ledger_line: 2026-07-11 | REFUTE | REFUTED "search works" | broke on: unicode names | commit: 5e6f7a8 | by: claude
cases.canonical_verdict_line: REFUTED "search works" | broke on: unicode names

cases.situation: A pgvector migration plan needs a pre-agreed abort condition.
cases.canonical_ledger_line: 2026-07-09 | GATE | TRIPPED p95=340ms>200ms | on-fail: STOP executed | commit: 1a2b3c4 | by: claude
cases.canonical_verdict_line: GATE: join p95 | > 200ms | pgbench after first batch | on-fail: STOP + report

cases.situation: UUID vs bigint primary keys — a possibly irreversible schema choice.
cases.canonical_ledger_line: 2026-07-09 | DOOR | one-way | locked: uuid pks | escape: full remap | commit: none | by: operator
cases.canonical_verdict_line: DOOR: one-way | locked: uuid pks | escape: full remap | gate: join p95

cases.situation: A catalog doc claims skills that no longer exist in the tree.
cases.canonical_ledger_line: 2026-07-12 | DRIFT | catalog vs skills/ | liar: spec (stale) | fix: doc + CI gate | commit: none | by: claude
cases.canonical_verdict_line: DRIFT: catalog vs skills/ | liar: spec (stale) | fix: doc + CI gate

cases.situation: Before a risky migration, imagine it already failed and enumerate deaths.
cases.canonical_ledger_line: 2026-07-12 | PREMORTEM | risk accepted: no rollback plan | deaths: 4 | commit: none | by: operator
cases.canonical_verdict_line: PREMORTEM: pgvector migration | deaths: 4 | hardened: 3 | accepted: 1, by operator

cases.situation: A symptom shows at the UI layer but the cause is a missing FK.
cases.canonical_ledger_line: 2026-07-12 | ALTITUDE | symptom at L5, cause at L2 (missing FK) | fixing at L2, plus L5 guard | commit: none | by: claude
cases.canonical_verdict_line: ALTITUDE: symptom at L5, cause at L2 (missing FK) — fixing at L2, plus L5 guard

cases.situation: A one-way door with no precedent and a failed disagreement check.
cases.canonical_ledger_line: 2026-07-12 | ESCALATE | ESC-012 queued | trigger: one-way door, no precedent | commit: none | by: operator
cases.canonical_verdict_line: ESCALATE: ESC-012 | one-way door, no precedent | queued

cases.situation: A new decision resembles a banked prior ruling.
cases.canonical_ledger_line: 2026-07-12 | PRECEDENT | followed DOOR-2026-07-09 | same lock-in class | commit: none | by: claude
cases.canonical_verdict_line: PRECEDENT: distinguished DOOR-2026-07-09 — different lock-in class

cases.situation: A judgment skill produced a verdict and it must be logged to the ledger.
cases.canonical_ledger_line: 2026-07-10 | GATE | OVERRIDE 200->400ms | reason: cold cache accepted | commit: 9f8e7d6 | by: operator
cases.canonical_verdict_line: 2026-07-10 | GATE | OVERRIDE 200->400ms | reason: cold cache accepted | by: operator

cases.situation: End of week: several open PRs; merge what is mechanically proven safe.
cases.canonical_ledger_line: 2026-07-14 | MERGE-TRAIN | 2 merged (#41 #42) | 1 HELD (not-approved) | 0 UNVERIFIED | by: claude
cases.canonical_verdict_line: MERGE-TRAIN: 2 merged (#41 #42) | 1 HELD (not-approved) | 0 UNVERIFIED | target CI: green

cases.situation: The skill library grew; audit token cost/bloat/overlap with numbers, mark usage axes UNVERIFIED without telemetry.
cases.canonical_ledger_line: 2026-07-14 | AUDIT | skills 20 in scope | 82883->79219 tok | tightened: biggest-skill | UNVERIFIED: usage axes | by: claude
cases.canonical_verdict_line: AUDIT: skills | 20 in scope | 82883->79219 tok | tightened: biggest-skill | UNVERIFIED: usage axes

cases.situation: Toolkit adopted on a repo with history; grade old merged PRs' done-claims.
cases.canonical_ledger_line: 2026-07-15 | BACKFILL | UNVERIFIED | 100 merged PRs, 40 done-claims, 28 evidenced (70%) | retro grade | by: casper-backfill
cases.canonical_verdict_line: BACKFILL: repo | 100 merged PRs | 40 done-claims | 28 evidenced (70%) | 12 shipped unproven
